_comment: Canonical source-of-truth registry for the teaching domain. For each kind of CLAIM, it says which source is authoritative (and at what rank), and which sources must NOT be used to prove it. The sot_resolver consumes this to pick a winner and to build an auditable decision + minority report. Offline JSON; fill in over time. Edit here (canonical) and run tools/sync_check.py. Prose: shared/context/source-of-truth.md.

compliance_source_ladder._comment: Default ranking for COMPLIANCE/MANDATE claims, highest authority first. Reused by several claim types. Mirrors authority_precedence but for legal/regulatory sources.

standard_code.proves: Which learning standard/benchmark applies, and its exact code.

authoritative_sources.note: advisory objective; not a mandated code

must_not_prove_from: a remembered code that has not been verified on the framework source
a vendor/blog crosswalk presented as the native code
standard_code.hard_rule: Never invent a code. Absence of a mandated code where none applies (home-ed/private) is correct, not a defect.

course_code.proves: A specific course number and its requirements (credit, level, EOC linkage).

authoritative_sources.note: authoritative for course numbers, titles, credit, and required EOCs

course_code.hard_rule: Cite the course number; verify level/EOC linkage on the Course Code Directory.

assessment_requirement.proves: Which statewide assessment a student takes and when (e.g., FAST, EOC, Statewide Science).

authoritative_sources.note: local testing windows within the state schedule

assessment_requirement.hard_rule: Grade and course matter (8th-grade science vs none in 6/7; EOC for credit-bearing courses). Verify the current schedule.

graduation_promotion_requirement.proves: Credits, EOC/assessment, and promotion/graduation rules for a student.

authoritative_sources.note: district may add to, not subtract from, state minimums

must_not_prove_from: a counselor's recollection without the statute/rule
graduation_promotion_requirement.hard_rule: State sets the floor; district may exceed it. Escalate individual student determinations to a human.

compliance_mandate.proves: An administrative/legal mandate in force (what MUST or MUST NOT happen).
must_not_prove_from: current classroom practice promoted to doctrine just because it recurs
compliance_mandate.hard_rule: Higher legal authority wins; a recurring local practice never overrides statute/rule. Record the citation.

operating_rule.proves: Pacing, calendar, grading scale, and local norms for how work is done.
must_not_prove_from: a single hallway conversation treated as policy
operating_rule.hard_rule: More-local is allowed within higher policy; an uploaded SOP outranks unwritten habit. Log overrides.

instructional_method.proves: How to teach something (strategy, sequence, grouping).
must_not_prove_from: a mandate that does not actually constrain pedagogy
instructional_method.hard_rule: Pedagogy is teacher discretion WITHIN policy; invert precedence toward the classroom for style decisions.

iep_504_requirement.proves: Required accommodations/modifications/services for a specific student.

authoritative_sources.note: the student's IEP/504/service plan (placeholder data only)

must_not_prove_from: assumptions about a disability without the plan
iep_504_requirement.hard_rule: The plan governs; never fabricate plan contents. ALWAYS escalate eligibility/placement to a human.

eligibility_scholarship.proves: Eligibility/accountability for a scholarship-funded private placement or service.
must_not_prove_from: a school's marketing claim of eligibility
eligibility_scholarship.hard_rule: Cite the statute/guidance; escalate individual eligibility to a human.

must_not_prove_from: state public-school rules assumed to bind a private school
accreditation_requirement.hard_rule: Private obligations come from the accreditor/framework, not the B.E.S.T./NGSSS mandate.

student_record.proves: A student's profile facts: name, grade, guardians/contacts, plan flags (IEP/504/EL), and medical action plans.

authoritative_sources.note: authoritative for student data when connected; updates regularly; used first unless the teacher overrides
teacher-maintained fallback/cache; secondary to a live SIS

authoritative_sources.ref: the student's signed medical/anaphylaxis action plan on file
authoritative_sources.note: AUTHORITATIVE and ONLY source for ePHI/medical instructions; never fabricate; defer to nurse/911

must_not_prove_from: a remembered/guessed name, contact, or medical instruction
fabricated medical dosages, timing, or protocols (use the signed plan verbatim)
student_record.hard_rule: On SIS<->local conflict, never auto-merge: raise with the user (which source wins + update local?). Real student data never enters a tracked/committed file.
